changes: Auto Jobs: decrypt jobs now read the file's required decryption power (CRYPT RATE) and automatically install/swap the right software — and, when needed, the strongest owned hardware — to meet it. A job no owned gear can power is bugged instead of failing the minigame.

Auto Jobs: Decrypt & Extract and Data Upload now locate their target file even when cor3.gg names it differently in the job, on the server, and in your Downloads (matched by file id and base name) — fixing jobs that previously couldn't find the file.

Loadout panel: each software card now lists its capabilities (type · power · the file types / server types it covers), and every capability target is clickable to install or remove the software that provides it.

Expeditions: new per-market "Markets & mercenaries" view — each faction market's mercenaries (regular and elite, with unlock progress), your faction reputation, mercenary trust and hire slots, all in one place.
Expeditions: fixed launching expeditions after the latest cor3.gg content patch (objective→goal rename, market-scoped config) and restored the per-mercenary cost/risk/outcome preview.
Expeditions: the whole tab is now translated and follows your chosen language.
Overview: market countdown timers no longer flicker or reset when market data refreshes in the background; Daily Ops clears the previous day's puzzle info when the timer rolls over to a new day.

Internal: a single market registry is the source of truth for market/faction ids (home/dark/srm/usol), and the expeditions mercenary fetch is hardened against mis-tagged data. Tested against cor3.gg web version 1.20.35.
